coverage: Walked the §0 defenses and every surface in threat-model.md. LSP and Obsidian command handlers were read but not exhaustively traced; flagged as residual rather than implied clean.

findings.title: MDS040 is advisory-only; keep docs from implying a runtime sandbox
findings.description: MDS040 lints recipe strings at check time; it does not sandbox execution. mdsmith never executes recipes, so this is a documentation-clarity note, not a defect.
findings.impact: None directly; the only risk is a reader assuming runtime protection that mdsmith does not provide.
findings.remediation: Keep docs explicit that the guarantee ends at the external runner.
